source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/라우터 (Archer C64)/2. Data Sheet & Operational Description of the product/Archer C64(EU US) 2.0_Datasheet.pdf

document.title: AC1200 Wi-Fi Router Dual Band | Full Gigabit Archer C64

sourceSummary.oneLine: TP-Link datasheet for the Archer C64 AC1200 dual-band full gigabit Wi-Fi router.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Product datasheet describing wireless performance, hardware specifications, security features, certifications, and operating requirements.
keyPoints: Archer C64 supports 867 Mbps on 5 GHz and 300 Mbps on 2.4 GHz.
Wireless security includes WPA/WPA2, WPA-PSK/WPA2-PSK/WPA3-SAE encryptions.
Transmit power is listed for CE and FCC conditions.
Certification section lists CE and RoHS.

entities.name: TP-Link Tether
entities.evidence: Tether lets you manage your network settings with your smartphone.

concepts.name: Dual Band Wi-Fi
concepts.evidence: 867 Mbps on the 5 GHz band and 300 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz

concepts.name: MU-MIMO
concepts.evidence: MU-MIMO technology serves multiple devices at once

concepts.name: Smart Connect
concepts.evidence: Smart Connect unites 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz band into a single Wi-Fi SSID

concepts.name: Beamforming Technology
concepts.evidence: Beamforming detects the location of your connected devices and concentrates the Archer C64’s signal towards them

concepts.name: WPA3
concepts.evidence: The latest Wi-Fi security protocol, WPA3

concepts.name: Guest Network
concepts.evidence: Guest Network – Keeps your main network secure by creating a separate network for friends and visitors

concepts.name: VPN Support
concepts.evidence: VPN Support – Safely reach files in local NAS, wherever you are

evidence.claim: The document identifies the product as Archer C64 AC1200 Wi-Fi Router.
evidence.evidenceText: AC1200 Wi-Fi Router Dual Band | Full Gigabit Archer C64

evidence.claim: The router supports 867 Mbps on 5 GHz and 300 Mbps on 2.4 GHz.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless: 867 Mbps on 5 GHz + 300 Mbps on 2.4 GHz

evidence.claim: The router operates on 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz frequency bands.
The hardware includes one gigabit WAN port and four gigabit LAN ports.
evidence.evidenceText: Ethernet Ports: 1× 10/100/1000 Mbps WAN Port, 4×10/100/1000 Mbps LAN Ports

evidence.claim: The router has four external antennas.
The US version uses a 12V/1A external power supply and the EU version uses a 9V/0.85A external power supply.
CE transmit power limits are listed as under 20 dBm for 2.4 GHz and under 23 dBm for 5.15 GHz to 5.25 GHz.
FCC transmit power is listed as under 30 dBm for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz.
Wireless security supports WPA/WPA2, WPA-PSK/WPA2-PSK, and WPA3-SAE encryptions.
The certification section lists CE and RoHS.
Maximum wireless signal rates are derived from IEEE Standard 802.11 specifications.
evidence.evidenceText: Maximum wireless signal rates are the physical rates derived from IEEE Standard 802.11 specifications.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit document date is present; ©2025 TP-Link is a copyright notice and was not treated as the document date.
Authority metadata is ambiguous because the source is a manufacturer datasheet rather than a regulatory certificate or authority-issued document.
Revision/version is inferred from sourcePath filename '2.0' and source URL model parameter 'Archer+C64_V2'.
